name: MX-Hotswap-3U (ai03 MX_V2)
description: Cherry MX-type mechanical keyboard switch, Kailh hotswap socket, 3u keysize. Imported from the ai03 MX_V2 keyboard library (MIT, (c) ai03); passed PartReel quality gates. Verified-2D part. Official KiCad libraries carry no hotswap / low-profile / hybrid switch footprints.
dimensions_source: ai03 MX_V2@0b379ee (MX_Hotswap.pretty/MX-Hotswap-3U.kicad_mod) — designed from scratch from official switch datasheets per upstream README

provenance.dimensions_source: ai03 MX_V2@0b379ee (MX_Hotswap.pretty/MX-Hotswap-3U.kicad_mod) — designed from scratch from official switch datasheets per upstream README

quality_gates.enforcement: CI runs all gates on every push and blocks deployment on any failure

modifications: symbol authored by PartReel (upstream pairs with stock KiCad symbols by design)
removed 3D model reference (socket-only model; part published as verified-2D)
remapped Dwgs.User outline to F.Fab (keyboard libraries avoid silk under the keycap)
added minimal silk pin-1 marker (hidden under the mounted switch)
